summary: Selected weighted delinquency severity formula with four signals; weights sum to 1.0.
formula_summary: Weighted sum: emi_bounce_count (35%) + missed_payment_count (30%) + days_past_due as severity multiplier (25%), normalized by monthly_outflow (10%), clamped to 0–1 range

signal_bindings.rationale: Primary indicator — direct evidence of recurring payment failure events
Cumulative payment discipline breakdown across the observation window
Amplifies score when delinquency is prolonged — captures both recency and duration
Normalization context — higher outflow relative to obligations reduces distress score
